  Notes:
    - MAJOR INGESTION EVENT: 45-file wiki daily run is the single largest ingestion in C2A2 history. +71 PRS triplets nearly doubled the corpus. The downstream question (ASSUMPTION-028, PRESUMPTION-029) is whether parallel subagent extraction preserved per-triplet quality or introduced correlated errors.
    - SYSTEMIC-RISK-FLAG (extended): PRESUMPTION-029 extends the selection-effect cluster (014, 020, 021, 024) to the multi-subagent batch case. The scaling assumption is that the same reading protocol produces the same quality at 1× and 45×. This is testable but untested.
    - OPERATIONAL-DRIFT-FLAG (new cluster): PRESUMPTION-030 (8-day version-control gap), PRESUMPTION-031 (specialist rotation coverage), PRESUMPTION-032 (morning-handoff channel failure aggregation) together describe silent degradation across three independent channels. No single item is critical; the pattern is that none were noticed until the next session stumbled over them. See OPEN-022.
    - CONCEPTUAL: FINDING-011a (boundary convergence) continues as the intellectual center. Awaiting principal responses (Kastrup, Hoffman, Friston, Levin). Agent 16 monitoring the condition.
    - ARCHITECTURAL COMMITMENT: DECISION-018 (Vite refactor) is the first time Tom has framed a tooling decision as "we are now fighting the format, not the problem." This crosses a threshold from incremental improvement to architectural rewrite for the visualization layer.
    - EPISTEMIC GAP: No 15a/15b cycle today means 11 items queued but un-tested. Queue growth (+11) exceeds processing (0) — the steady-state hypothesis (PRESUMPTION-028) is being stressed by days when the pipeline runs 14a/14b only.

**Trajectory assessment:** April 16 was a day of two opposing movements. The corpus grew by ~89% in a single ingestion — the largest single-day expansion in C2A2's history — while three infrastructure channels degraded silently (189-file git gap, stale Gmail walk-note, Chrome MCP unavailable). The productive axis is content: more triplets, more connections, more findings, more specialist proposals, and a decisive architectural commitment to rewrite the visualization layer. The degradation axis is operational: the plumbing is rotting faster than the roof can be shingled. The new OPERATIONAL-DRIFT-FLAG cluster (PRESUMPTION-030/031/032) is the system's first recognition that silent infrastructure decay is now a category worth tracking, not a set of one-off incidents. If tomorrow's run re-observes any of these same degraded states, the flag should be escalated to CRITICAL.
